description: Fix figure rows at fixed distances from the bottom of the window so they stay at consistent positions regardless of how many rows are populated.
steps: Change .region-diorama-stage CSS from flex column to position:relative, remove gap/margin-bottom/justify-content
Update inline styles in RegionDetailModal.tsx to use bottom:170px (front), bottom:265px (mid), bottom:345px (back)
Only render row divs that have figures in them
acceptance_criteria: Front row always at 170px from the bottom of the window
Mid row always at 265px from the bottom of the window
Back row always at 345px from the bottom of the window
npx vite build completes without errors
verification: Run `npx vite build` in /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent and confirm exit code 0 with no errors
findings: Changed .region-diorama-stage from flex column layout to position:relative. Changed .region-diorama-layer to position:absolute with left:0;right:0. Added inline bottom values (170px front, 265px mid, 345px back) to each row in RegionDetailModal.tsx. Empty rows are conditionally rendered. Vite build passes cleanly.
